achievement.initialAccomplishedList.rationale: Listener confirmed achievement_list (ground truth). Scraper also has is_last/count from sibling-promoted shape. Caller iterates achievement entries via initAchievementConvertData.

ad.changeAd.rationale: No listener fired. Scraper found ad_status as the sole field. NPPS4 returns None. The caller updates AdRewardModel store, suggesting at most ad_info-shaped response. Conservative single-field guess from scraper.

arena.cancelDreamSession.rationale: No listener fired, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Callsite (m_arena/model/base.lua) passes response_data through a tofunction callback without reading any fields, indicating the body is likely empty or echoes envelope only.

arena.matchLiveAutoPlay.rationale: No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4, no callers. Treated as POLLING-like with no body fields; conservative empty schema.

arena.moveUpStage.rationale: Ambiguous category, no listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Callsite in m_arena/model/result.lua reads no fields. Conservative empty body.

arena.recoveryAutoPlayableCount.rationale: Listener observed after_sns_coin (ground truth). Scraper saw auto_playable_count. m_boot/initialize.lua listener reads after_user_info (typical recovery shape). Two sources agree on the recovery-style payload.

arena.tierRanking.rationale: Ambiguous, no listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Modeling as paginated ranking READ based on m_ranking caller and sibling ranking patterns (page/id/rank request params imply ranking_list response).

banner.bannerList.rationale: No listener fired and no scraper output, but NPPS4 (banner.py) is a verified reference and confirms banner_list + time_limit. Banner endpoint shape is well-defined as a READ list.

battle.liveStart.rationale: No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling duel.liveStart returns all_user_goal/goal_type and duty.liveStart returns event_team_duty/live_list. Modeled with conservative live-start fields based on event_id request param.

challenge.continue.rationale: Listener confirmed effort_point + reward_item_list (ground truth). Scraper covers full continue mutate shape (before/after_user_info, class_system, challenge_info).

challenge.status.rationale: No listener fired. Scraper found only challenge_info as the sole field. Simple READ endpoint returning current challenge state.

class.competitionGeneralRanking.rationale: Listener confirmed ranking_list (ground truth). Scraper adds ranking_info. Standard paginated ranking READ.

class.competitionResult.rationale: No listener fired. Scraper found result:bool as sole field. Siblings competitionHallOfFame/Ready/Gameover all return result:bool. Simple status check MUTATE.

class.livePlay.rationale: Listener confirmed challenge_mission_list (ground truth). Scraper adds available_live_resume (live-start pattern, resume-check).

class.voteFinal.rationale: No listener fired. Scraper found only result:bool. Siblings (voteSemifinal, entryFinal) all return result:bool. Simple commit-style MUTATE.

common.recoveryEnergy.rationale: Listener confirmed after_sns_coin (ground truth). NPPS4 verified reference with full energy recovery shape (energy_max, training_energy, before/after coin counters).

concert.liveStart.rationale: AMBIGUOUS, no listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling pattern *LiveStart returns available_live_resume.

costume.costumeStatus.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): costume_list. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

download.getUrl.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): url_list. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duel.endWait.rationale: Listener confirmed matching_user (ground truth). Scraper adds end_flag. Standard wait-style poll for duel room close.

duel.livePolling.rationale: POLLING category. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Polling responses are typically tiny status deltas — modeled conservatively as an empty/optional body.

duel.privateLeave.rationale: No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling duty.privateLeave returns success:bool. Conservative single-field guess.

duty.allUserMission.rationale: Listener confirmed all_user_mission_list (ground truth). Scraper resolved sub-shape (has_played, goal_list) plus all_user_mission_total.

duty.historyDetail.rationale: READ detail. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling duty.history returns room_list. Detail variant typically returns a single room/session object.

duty.privateJoin.rationale: Scraper found error_code, difficulty, room_id. Sibling duel.privateJoin has identical shape. Two sources agree on the join-result shape.

duty.top.rationale: Listener observed event_reward_info (ground truth). Scraper confirms event_team_duty:object with all_user_mission_value nested structure. Two sources support the heterogeneous top-page bag.

eventscenario.startup.rationale: Listener observed event_scenario_list with subfields event_scenario_id, status. Scraper agrees.

festival.deckList.rationale: Scraper provides full structure: festival object with event_festival_live_list, festival_previous_item_ids, available_mission_bonus_list. Sibling festival.liveSetList shows similar live-track structure.

festival.missionStatus.rationale: Scraper provides now_mission, next_page_id, mission_status_list. Sibling challenge.status returns challenge_info (similar status pattern). Two sources support the paginated mission status shape.

friend.request.rationale: Listener observed is_friend (ground truth). No scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling friend.list returns friend_list but isn't a direct match; the boolean is the canonical request-confirmation field.

gdpr.update.rationale: MUTATE GDPR update. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling gdpr.detail returns permission:object{granted:int}. Modeled as a confirmation echo.

handover.kidCheck.rationale: Scraper provides user_info:object{level:int, name:str}. NPPS4 (handover.py) confirms user_info:KIDCheckUserInfo. Two sources agree.

handover.reserveTransfer.rationale: NPPS4 (handover.py) verified code, insert_date, invite_code as the canonical transfer-reservation shape. No listener or scraper but NPPS4 prior is strong for handover endpoints.

item.useReinforceItem.rationale: Scraper found after:object{display_rank:int}. Sibling item.userRankUp and item.exchange both return after_user_info, suggesting the reinforce mutation echoes updated unit state. Modeled conservatively with after object.

klab_id.kidRewardOpenAll.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list with subfield accessory_owning_user_id (3 crashes). Scraper adds after_user_info.

lbonus.execute.rationale: Listener observed 7 root fields (3 crashes mid-body). Scraper + NPPS4 corroborate full structure.

live.preciseScore.rationale: Listener observed rank_info. Scraper + NPPS4 add can_activate_effect, off, on.

login.login.rationale: NPPS4 (login.py) verified: authorize_token, idfa_enabled, review_version, skip_login_news, user_id. Canonical login response. No listener or scraper, but NPPS4 is authoritative here.

marathon.top.rationale: Listener observed event_reward_info (sibling event_reward listener consumes top responses). Scraper output adds event_status; sibling battle.top/challenge.top also have event_status. Listener crashed mid-body so additional fields likely.

notice.noticeFriendGreeting.rationale: Listener observed greeting_list. Scraper adds next_id (pagination cursor matching request arg).

online.info.rationale: READ info, no listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Online (LAN multiplayer) info endpoint. Callsite in m_online/online.lua + m_boot/initialize.lua suggests it carries server/availability state. Modeled with a single info object.

payment.processLog.rationale: AMBIGUOUS log endpoint. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling payment.history returns payment_history_list. Modeled as a write-only log with no body fields (typical for processLog/audit endpoints).

personalnotice.clearCache.rationale: Cache-clear action; no listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Conservative empty body — clear operations typically return only the envelope.

platformAccount.isConnectedPfAccount.rationale: AMBIGUOUS check action with platform_token request. No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Modeled with a single is_connected bool based on action name.

quest.continue.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper adds before_user_info, after_user_info, class_system — mirrors challenge.continue sibling shape.

quest.questList.rationale: Listener observed quest_list. Scraper confirms list shape.

ranking.eventLive.rationale: Listener observed ranking_list. Scraper adds is_last (paginated leaderboard).

reward.exchange.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper adds after_user_info.

reward.sellUnit.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info + get_exchange_point_list (required). Scraper adds total and reward_box_flag.

rlive.reward.rationale: Listener observed 5 root fields; scraper cascade corroborates all of them plus event_info, daily_reward_info, goal_accomp_info, hi_score, is_high_score, class_system, after_user_info. MUTATE reward endpoint.

secretbox.knapsackSelect.rationale: AMBIGUOUS gacha-selection action. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Conservative empty body — knapsackSelect is likely a server-side draw configuration step that may return minimal/no data.

secretbox.stampDetail.rationale: READ detail endpoint. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Modeled with a single stamp_detail object based on action name.

subscenario.reward.rationale: Listener observed 2 root fields; scraper and NPPS4 both corroborate plus full MUTATE pattern (before/after_user_info, achievement counters, class_system).

tutorial.skip.rationale: MUTATE skip action. No listener, empty scraper, NPPS4 has handler with None return type. Conservative empty body — skip operations typically just acknowledge.

unit.createAccessory.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (with game_coin nested); scraper provides created_accessory + unit_removable_skill. MUTATE.

unit.favoriteAccessory.rationale: AMBIGUOUS favorite toggle. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Toggle operations typically return only an ack. Conservative empty body.

unit.removableSkillInfo.rationale: Listener observed owning_info; scraper and NPPS4 both corroborate plus equipment_info.

unit.supporterAll.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on unit_support_list.

user.addUnitMax.rationale: Scraper found used_loveca and after_unit_max. NPPS4 (user.py) confirms identical fields. Sibling user.addFriendMax has matching after_friend_max+used_loveca shape. Three-source alignment.

user.setNotification.rationale: MUTATE setter. No listener, empty scraper, no NPPS4. Setter operations typically return only an ack. Conservative empty body.

achievement.pagingAccomplishedList.rationale: Listener confirmed achievement_list (ground truth). Scraper + sibling pagingUnaccomplishList agree on is_last/count/achievement_list paginated shape.

album.albumAll.rationale: ROOTMODEL CONFLICT: NPPS4 says list[AlbumInfo] (RootModel). Listener observed root field 'album_list' — clear object-key access. Scraper agrees. Per decision rule #1 (listener-observed object key wins), wire format is an object wrapping the list. NPPS4 RootModel structurally wrong here.

arena.cheerUnitDeck.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Request shape (arena_id + unit_deck_detail) is a mutation; caller cheer_deck.lua reads cheer_unit_deck_detail and cheer_unit_list from response. Inferred from caller observations.

arena.matchLiveContinue.rationale: Listener confirmed live_info (ground truth). Scraper + sibling rivalLiveContinue agree on after_sns_coin + after_user_info typical continue shape.

arena.privateMatchLiveEnd.rationale: Listener observed live_info root field; scraper output and sibling matchLiveEnd/dreamLiveEnd/rivalLiveEnd all converge on live_info: list[{live_difficulty_id}]. Three independent supports.

arena.rivalLiveContinue.rationale: Listener confirmed live_info (ground truth). Scraper + sibling matchLiveContinue agree on after_sns_coin + after_user_info shape.

arena.top.rationale: 4 listener-observed root fields (ground truth). Scraper resolves arena_id, collab_id, rival_info, plus dream_session_info.deck_info.unit_list sub-shape.

battle.battleInfo.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. READ info pattern; sibling battle.top has event_status; battle module deals with team battle live events.

battle.matching.rationale: No listener fired; matching is polling/short-payload. Request takes event_id/difficulty/lp_factor. Sibling shapes vary widely; keep minimal with matching_user/match shape.

challenge.finalize.rationale: Listener observed 3 root fields: after_user_info, event_info (with event_reward_info nested), reward_item_list — all canonical MUTATE-on-finalize fields. Treat each as required.

challenge.top.rationale: Listener observed event_reward_info; scraper has event_status. Both event_status + event_reward_info align with battle.top + festival.top sibling patterns.

class.competitionHallOfFame.rationale: No listener fired but scraper has result: bool. Sibling class.competitionResult also returns result: bool. Two sources align.

class.competitionSpectateLive.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Request shape (competition_id, play_kind, group_id, is_semifinal, unit_deck_id, unit_list) suggests a spectate-live entry; sibling competitionResult/competitionHallOfFame return result: bool.

class.liveResult.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): reward_item_list. Scraper cascade adds 4 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

class.voteSemifinal.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Request shape (play_kind, group_a_user_id, group_b_user_id) suggests vote submission; sibling class.competitionResult returns result: bool.

concert.liveContinue.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): live_info. Scraper cascade adds 2 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

concert.lootBoxPick.rationale: No listener fired but scraper has can_reset: bool + voltage_point: int. Concert lootbox is a pick/use mutation — these two fields are the documented response. Two sources align (scraper + action category).

costume.dressUp.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Sibling costume.makeCostume returns costume_list. dressUp is a state-change mutation on a unit's outfit; minimal post-state.

download.luaDownload.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Request takes s3_url; this is likely a passthrough/ack that the asset was registered. Minimal ack response.

duel.fixTime.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. No request fields beyond envelope; likely returns a server-anchored time for duel coordination.

duel.liveStart.rationale: Scraper has all_user_goal: object + goal_type: int. No listener fired but scraper-derived fields are direct callsite reads. Sibling duty.liveStart shape differs (event_team_duty/live_list).

duel.privateMakeMatch.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): live_list. Scraper cascade adds 3 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duty.dutyInfo.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. READ info pattern; sibling duty.endRoom/gameover return event_team_duty: object.

duty.liveEnd.rationale: Listener observed 2 root field(s): live_info, reward_item_list. Scraper cascade adds 4 field(s). 2 field(s) agree across sources.

duty.privateJoinMatch.rationale: No listener fired but scraper has start_after: Any. Sibling duty.privateJoin/privateCreate provide room_id/entry_token pattern. Scraper + sibling agree on shape minimum.

effortPoint.selectLimitedBox.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper cascade adds after_user_info.

eventscenario.status.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on event_scenario_list as list.

festival.festivalInfo.rationale: Listener observed festival_previous_item_ids. Scraper adds festival object.

festival.top.rationale: Listener observed event_reward_info; scraper has event_status, mission_status, failed_mission_status, is_new_mission — direct callsite reads. Multiple sources align with sibling battle.top/challenge.top.

friend.requestCancel.rationale: No listener fired (3 crashes mid-body suggest the listener exists and tried). Scraper empty, no NPPS4. Friend request cancel is a tiny ack mutation.

greet.delete.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. greet delete is a small mutation that removes a like; likely returns ack/updated list.

handover.kidDelete.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. klab_id-account delete is a state-change ack. Sibling handover.kidStatus has has_klab_id.

handover.start.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. handover.start initiates account transfer via handover_code; should yield user_info preview or a session token.

item.userRankUp.rationale: Listener observed class_system (3 crashes mid-body). Scraper cascade adds after_user_info.

klab_id.kidUnaccomplishList.rationale: Listener observed klab_id_task_list. Scraper cascade adds is_last, count.

live.continue.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Parallels arena.matchLiveContinue (after_sns_coin observed there); request shape mirrors live-end scoring. Best-effort continuation payload.

live.publishPreciseScoreId.rationale: Scraper has precise_score_id: int — direct callsite read. Sibling live.publishPreciseScoreId echoes the same field shape; action name confirms. Single tight payload.

login.topInfo.rationale: No listener fired but NPPS4 prior is rich and well-verified (production server). Drop NPPS4's own envelope-style fields (server_timestamp, present_cnt) since they're on the mixin.

multiunit.multiunitscenarioStatus.rationale: No listener fired but NPPS4 prior has multi_unit_scenario_status_list: list[MultiUnitScenarioInfo]. Mirrors eventscenario.status pattern.

notice.noticeFriendVariety.rationale: Listener observed notice_list. Scraper + NPPS4 both add item_count.

online.play.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper adds after_user_info. Listener crashed mid-body so likely more fields. Sibling rlive.play has live_info/live_list pattern.

payment.productList.rationale: Scraper has sns_product_list/subscription_list/under_age_info/restriction_info/product_list — direct callsite reads. NPPS4 prior corroborates all five plus show_point_shop. Two strong sources align.

personalnotice.get.rationale: Scraper has has_notice: bool. NPPS4 prior corroborates has_notice plus contents/notice_id/title/type. Two sources align; tight READ payload.

preciseScore.manualUpdate.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Request shape is a full live-end scoring submission; expected ack-only response.

quest.gameover.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. Sibling duty.gameover has event_team_duty.all_user_mission_value object. Quest gameover yields a small post-state.

quest.questReward.rationale: Listener observed effort_point, live_result (with nested unlocked_subscenario_ids), using_buff_info. Scraper additionally provides class_system, event_info with detailed nested live_event_reward_info/scenario_event_reward_info, and live_result sub-fields.

ranking.eventLiveDetail.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, no NPPS4 prior. READ detail pattern; takes event_id + user_id. Expect per-user event live ranking detail.

reward.exchangeList.rationale: Listener observed exchange_list and exchange_point_list. Both confirmed by scraper.

reward.useLotteryTicket.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper adds after_user_info — standard MUTATE result shape.

scenario.reward.rationale: Listener observed 3 root fields; scraper and NPPS4 (verified ref) corroborate all plus standard MUTATE fields. Strong 3-source agreement.

secretbox.multi.rationale: Listener observed 4 root fields (free_gift_rewards, item_list, limit_bonus_rewards, after_user_info); scraper corroborates all plus secret_box_badge_flag, secret_box_items. AMBIGUOUS but functionally MUTATE.

skit.skitInfo.rationale: Listener observed skit_list; scraper corroborates. Simple READ endpoint.

subscenario.startup.rationale: No listener fired but NPPS4 prior has scenario_adjustment: int + subscenario_id: int. Tight startup ack payload.

unit.accessoryAll.rationale: Listener observed accessory_list + wearing_info (with nested keys); scraper and NPPS4 both corroborate plus especial_create_flag.

unit.deck.rationale: Listener observed unit_deck_list; scraper corroborates. NPPS4 covers it but type is unresolved.

unit.maxLevelUp.rationale: No listener fired but scraper has after: object with max_level: int. Sibling unit.rankUp/merge/mergeAccessory all use after: object. Two sources align.

unit.removableSkillRankUp.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info + owning_info. Sibling unit.createAccessory has unit_removable_skill.owning_info nested. Two observed roots covered.

unit.unitAll.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on both root fields active/waiting.

user.changeName.rationale: Listener observed after_name; NPPS4 prior has after_name + before_name. Two sources align on tight change-name payload.

user.setNotificationToken.rationale: No listener fired, scraper empty, NPPS4 covers but shape unresolved (None return). Likely empty/ack response.

achievement.pagingUnaccomplishList.rationale: No listener fired, no NPPS4 prior. Scraper cascade is well-defined READ-paginated shape (is_last/count/<thing>_list), matches the `paging*List` pattern and sibling `achievement.pagingUnaccomplishList` echo. Achievement rows draw from achievement_m columns.

album.seriesAll.rationale: Listener confirmed album_series_list. Scraper resolved sub-fields from dbapi (album_series_m columns: album_series_id, album_group_id, album_tab_id, order_num, name, name_en, layout_type).

arena.dailyRanking.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Request shape (domain/page/id/rank/buff) is the standard SIF ranking pagination cursor; response is almost certainly a ranking list plus self-rank info. Naming alone; conservative Any-typed list.

arena.matchLiveEnd.rationale: 8 listener-observed root fields (ground truth). Scraper adds arena_challengeable_point. Live-end reward stack analogous to dreamLiveEnd/rivalLiveEnd.

arena.privateMatchLiveGameOver.rationale: No listener, scraper empty, no NPPS4. Sibling *LiveEnd shapes (arena.matchLiveEnd, arena.rivalLiveEnd) consistently return after_user_info/live_info/class_system/drop_info reward stacks. Private/gameOver implies user-state mutation. Conservative — only fields with strong sibling support.

arena.rivalLiveEnd.rationale: 10 listener-observed root fields (ground truth) + scraper arena_match_result. Mirrors dreamLiveEnd structure exactly.

award.awardInfo.rationale: Listener observed root `award_info`. NPPS4 prior confirms `award_info :: list[AwardInfo]`. Two sources align; promote to list.

battle.endRoom.rationale: 6 listener-observed root fields (ground truth). Scraper provides full live-end reward stack identical to duel.endRoom sibling. All fields well-corroborated.

battle.startWait.rationale: No listener; scraper supplies `battle_player_num: int` and `capacity: int`. *Wait endpoints are polling-shaped — keep minimal.

challenge.gameover.rationale: Listener observed 4 roots (after_user_info, event_info with event_reward_info subpath, reward_item_list). No scraper, no NPPS4. Standard *gameover reward-stack subset.

class.commitChallengeMission.rationale: No listener, no NPPS4. Scraper supplies the entire mission-commit shape (challenge_mission_list, challenge_rank_id, capital_value, challenge_reset_date). Trust scraper for MUTATE actions when it has 4 fields.

class.competitionLiveEnd.rationale: Listener observed 2 root field(s): live_info, reward_item_list. Scraper cascade adds 5 field(s). 2 field(s) agree across sources.

class.competitionStartWait.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. *StartWait is polling-shaped; sibling battle/startWait returns tiny status. Empty payload most likely.

class.selectCompetitionArea.rationale: No listener, no NPPS4. Scraper supplies `ranking_info: object`. Single-source but scraper-promoted means a callsite reads it.

comeback.achieveInfo.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): achievement_list. Scraper cascade adds 2 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

concert.liveEnd.rationale: Listener observed 5 root field(s): effort_point, reward_item_list, reward_unit_list, unlocked_multi_unit_scenario_ids, unlocked_subscenario_ids. Scraper cascade adds 12 field(s). 5 field(s) agree across sources.

concert.lootBoxReset.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Reset MUTATE — typically returns the reset state shape.

costume.makeCostume.rationale: No listener, no NPPS4. Scraper supplies `costume_list: list`. MUTATE that makes a costume returns the updated cosmetics inventory.

download.update.rationale: Listener observed 2 root field(s): package_list, url_list. Scraper cascade adds 2 field(s). 2 field(s) agree across sources.

duel.gpsMatch.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): matching_user_list. Scraper cascade adds 2 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duel.matching.rationale: No listener fired. Scraper found matching_user list + end_flag (same shape as duel.endWait). Polling-style matching endpoint.

duel.privateOpenMatch.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Open-match MUTATE for private room — returns room status.

duty.endRoom.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): event_team_duty. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duty.liveStart.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): live_list. Scraper cascade adds 2 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duty.privateLeave.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Leave-room MUTATE — typically a simple success ack.

event.eventList.rationale: Listener observed target_list. Scraper + NPPS4 prior corroborate as list.

exchange.itemInfo.rationale: Listener observed exchange_item_info. Scraper + NPPS4 add exchange_point_list.

festival.gameover.rationale: Listener observed 4 roots (after_user_info, event_info with event_id/event_point_info/event_reward_info). No scraper, no NPPS4. Standard *gameover subset.

festival.updateLiveList.rationale: Listener observed `after_user_info`. Scraper independently has `live_track_ids: list`. Two sources align — combine.

friend.response.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Friend-request response MUTATE returns the resolved relationship.

greet.user.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. LIKE-user MUTATE — returns success ack and possibly token bookkeeping.

handover.kidHandover.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 handler returns None — likely empty payload with status code only.

item.exchange.rationale: No listener observations cleared (3 crashes mid-body, none counted), but scraper supplies `after_user_info: object` with `level: int` subfield. Item-exchange MUTATE.

klab_id.kidInitialAccomplishedList.rationale: Listener + scraper agree on accomplished_list as list.

klab_id.sync.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Sync MUTATE — likely returns status flag.

live.gameover.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 handler returns None. Despite the rich live/reward sibling, live/gameover is typically a thin ack; the heavy reward stack arrives in the follow-up live/reward call.

live.reward.rationale: Listener observed 16 root fields (3 crashes mid-body). Scraper + NPPS4 broadly corroborate.

login.topInfoOnce.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 prior covers 11 fields (counts, status flags, notification). These are all top-screen status indicators — single-source NPPS4 but well-trodden.

multiunit.scenarioReward.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list (required). Scraper adds after_user_info and class_system. Sibling eventscenario.reward has identical 3-field shape. Listener also reads item_reward_info and clear_multi_unit_scenario via m_boot init.

notice.noticeMarquee.rationale: Listener observed marquee_list. Scraper + NPPS4 both add item_count.

online.playExhibition.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. LAN-multiplayer exhibition play MUTATE — likely returns a status ack.

payment.receipt.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 prior gives `product: PaymentReceiptProduct`, `status: bool` (skipping server_timestamp envelope field).

platformAccount.connectAccounts.rationale: Listener observed connected_account_list. Scraper adds success flag (standard for connect/login mutate endpoints).

profile.cardRanking.rationale: ROOTMODEL CONFLICT: NPPS4 says list[ProfileCardRanking] (RootModel). No listener fired, but scraper found 'card_ranking_list' as a root field — that came from direct source analysis of a callsite, so a callsite reads response_data.card_ranking_list. That's object-key access, contradicting NPPS4 RootModel. Sibling ranking endpoints (class/arena/event) all use a {ranking_list, ...} wrapper pattern. Going with wrapper.

quest.itemInfo.rationale: Listener observed quest_item_list. Scraper confirms list shape.

quest.questStart.rationale: Listener observed live_list. Scraper adds rlive_token (quest uses rlive token for the live session) and after_user_info.

ranking.eventPlayer.rationale: Listener observed ranking_list. Scraper adds my_info (caller's own rank entry).

reward.open.rationale: Listener observed 4 root fields (accomplished_achievement_list, added_achievement_list, success, unit_support_list). Scraper + NPPS4 add after_user_info, before_user_info, class_system, opened_num, new_achievement_cnt, unaccomplished_achievement_cnt. All three sources align broadly.

rlive.continue.rationale: Listener observed live_info. Scraper adds token (continue handshake token). Note live_info is list per scraper but listener accessed it as object — model both possibilities; defer to scraper.

scenario.scenarioStatus.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on the single root field scenario_status_list.

secretbox.pon.rationale: Listener observed 6 root fields; scraper and NPPS4 corroborate all plus a rich set of pon-specific fields. Strong 3-source agreement.

sns.addReward.rationale: Listener observed reward_list; scraper adds after_user_info (standard MUTATE pattern, also seen in sibling area.addReward).

subscenario.subscenarioStatus.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on both root fields. Simple READ.

unit.accessoryMaterialAll.rationale: Listener observed accessory_material_list; scraper corroborates. Single-field READ.

unit.deckInfo.rationale: Listener observed unit_deck_list; scraper adds active_deck_index. NPPS4 covers (UnitDeckInfoResponse unresolved).

unit.merge.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (game_coin nested); scraper has 'after' object (with unit_skill_exp); NPPS4 provides rich MUTATE pattern with achievement lists, exchange points, removable skill, scenario unlocks.

unit.removableSkillSell.rationale: Scraper supplies `after_user_info: object`; NPPS4 prior adds `reward_box_flag: bool` and `total: int`. Two sources align.

unit.wait.rationale: Listener observed `unit_removable_skill.owning_info`. NPPS4 prior confirms `unit_removable_skill :: RemovableSkillOwningInfo`. Two sources align.

user.changeNavi.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 handler returns None. Navi change is a thin MUTATE — likely empty payload.

user.showAllItem.rationale: Listener observed item_list; scraper corroborates. Simple READ.

achievement.rewardOpen.rationale: Listener confirmed after_user_info (ground truth). Scraper + NPPS4 agree on accomplished_achievement_list, added_achievement_list, reward_item_list. unit_support_list comes from NPPS4 + unit_deck_cache_listener that reads it.

announce.checkState.rationale: No listener, no scraper output. NPPS4 prior is the sole source but the field (has_unread_announce) is the only sensible payload for a polling/status endpoint of this name. Single-source so medium not high.

arena.dreamLiveEnd.rationale: 10 listener-observed root fields (ground truth). Scraper adds arena_match_result (dream-specific). Live-end reward stack consistent with sibling concert.liveEnd.

arena.matchLiveGameOver.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Action name (GameOver) and request shape (full live score payload + reason + auto_play) imply a give-up/timeout submission. Siblings give weak hints. Returning a tiny acknowledgement.

arena.privateMatchLiveStart.rationale: Scraper found available_live_resume; sibling arena.matchLiveStart and rivalLiveStart confirm the same root field. No listener/NPPS4. Two-source agreement (scraper + sibling pattern).

arena.rivalLiveGameOver.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Same GameOver pattern as arena.matchLiveGameOver. Treat as low-confidence tiny acknowledgement.

award.set.rationale: No listener observed, no scraper output. NPPS4 has a None return. Setting an award is a tiny MUTATE — server typically returns empty body, so emit no concrete fields.

battle.endWait.rationale: Scraper confirms ended_flag (bool) and end_wait_time (int). Sibling battle.startWait and duel.endWait support the polling shape. No listener, no NPPS4.

battle.top.rationale: Listener observed event_reward_info root field. Scraper found event_status (also seen on challenge.top, festival.top). Combining the two; no NPPS4.

challenge.init.rationale: No listener, no scraper output, no NPPS4. Sibling challenge.checkpoint/status return challenge_info; init likely seeds the same.

class.competitionFinalLiveEnd.rationale: Listener confirmed live_info (ground truth). Scraper + sibling competitionLiveEnd agree on result + after_user_info shape for competition end.

class.competitionLivePlay.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Request shape is a session-start-style payload (unit_deck_id, unit_list). Likely returns a resume-handle similar to arena.*LiveStart, but no source corroboration.

class.entryFinal.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Entering the final stage of class competition; siblings (commit/skip mission) suggest a status snapshot.

class.selectCompetitionPromise.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Setting a deck-promise for competition; siblings selectCompetitionArea returns ranking_info. Likely tiny ack.

common.checkNgword.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Endpoint checks if a user-entered word is allowed. Returns a tiny is-valid bool.

concert.liveGameOver.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. GameOver semantics — likely tiny acknowledgement; siblings give no concrete shape.

concert.lootBoxTop.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): concert_list. Scraper cascade adds 3 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

download.additional.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): url_list. Scraper cascade adds 2 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duel.assistLog.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): assist_log. Scraper cascade adds 3 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duel.leave.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Leaving a duel room is a tiny MUTATE — likely empty response or a single ack.

duel.privateClose.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Closing a private room — tiny MUTATE, likely empty response.

duel.privateStartWait.rationale: Listener confirmed matching_user (ground truth). Scraper adds start_flag. Mirrors public startWait + private session.

duty.endWait.rationale: Scraper has end_flag (bool); sibling battle.endWait/duel.endWait confirm polling pattern with end_flag. No listener, no NPPS4.

duty.matching.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field: live_list. Scraper cascade corroborates as list of object.

duty.privateMakeMatch.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field: live_list. Scraper cascade corroborates as list of object.

event.eventYellDeck.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Setting yell-deck for an event; likely tiny MUTATE or empty body.

exchange.owningPoint.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on exchange_point_list as list.

festival.liveReward.rationale: Listener observed 5 root fields (3 crashes mid-body). Scraper cascade adds many supporting fields.

freeLive.play.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Request has live_difficulty_id + unit_deck_id (start-style). Action `play` for freeLive likely initiates a session and returns a resume handle plus live_info.

friend.search.rationale: NPPS4 prior gives user_info, center_unit_info, friend_status, is_alliance, setting_award_id. Sibling friend.list does not reuse these (different shape — list). Single NPPS4 source, but the field set is exactly what a friend-detail-by-invite-code lookup must return.

handover.abortTransfer.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 has handler with None return type. Abort = tiny MUTATE returning empty body.

handover.kidInfo.rationale: Scraper has auth_url:str; NPPS4 prior confirms auth_url:str. Two sources align on the single field. No listener but the shape is unambiguous.

item.list.rationale: Listener observed 3 root fields. Scraper + NPPS4 corroborate, both add reinforce_info dict.

klab_id.kidPagingAccomplishedList.rationale: Listener observed achievement_list. Scraper cascade adds is_last, count.

klab_id.syncActivate.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Sync/activate via auth_code is similar to handover.kidInfo flow — likely returns an auth_url or status.

live.liveStatus.rationale: Listener observed 5 list fields. Scraper + NPPS4 corroborate all, add can_resume_live.

live.schedule.rationale: Listener observed 7 root fields. Scraper + NPPS4 corroborate all.

login.unitList.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on member_category_list as list of object.

multiunit.scenarioStartup.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling scenario.startup has scenario_id/scenario_adjustment from NPPS4. Likely mirrors that.

notice.noticeUserGreetingHistory.rationale: Listener observed greeting_history_list. Scraper adds is_last (pagination).

online.result.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper adds hi_score, after_user_info, is_high_score — these mirror live.reward/festival.liveReward result patterns.

payment.setBirth.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling user.setBirth returns is_today_birthday. Likely identical here for COPPA/under-age gating.

platformAccount.disconnectAccounts.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Disconnect = tiny MUTATE, likely empty body.

profile.liveCnt.rationale: Listener observed live_count_list. Scraper adds live_cnt (matches endpoint name). NPPS4 has handler but type unresolved.

quest.owningSeal.rationale: Listener observed seal_list. Scraper confirms list shape.

quest.useSeal.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper adds before_user_info and after_user_info — standard MUTATE result shape.

ranking.live.rationale: Listener observed items. Scraper + NPPS4 align on page/rank/total_cnt fields.

reward.openAll.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info + class_system. Scraper adds reward_item_list, opened_num, total_num; NPPS4 corroborates all plus before_user_info, achievement fields.

rlive.gameover.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Random-live gameover; likely tiny ack mirroring arena.matchLiveGameOver.

scenario.startup.rationale: NPPS4 prior gives scenario_id and scenario_adjustment. No listener/scraper. Single source but tightly matches the action shape.

secretbox.selectPickUp.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Setting pickup unit for a gacha — likely tiny MUTATE returning result/ack.

sns.getReward.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list; scraper adds after_user_info (matches sibling comeback.getReward).

tos.tosAgree.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 handler returns None. TOS-agree is a tiny MUTATE — empty body.

unit.deckName.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 handler has None return. Renaming a deck — tiny MUTATE, empty body.

unit.mergeAccessory.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (game_coin nested); scraper has 'after' object with accessory_owning_user_id.

unit.sale.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (game_coin nested); scraper has reward_box_flag; NPPS4 provides full sale MUTATE pattern.

unit.wearAccessory.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Equipping accessory — likely tiny MUTATE with an after:object similar to siblings.

user.getNavi.rationale: NPPS4 prior gives user (UserNavi). No listener/scraper. Single source but action name matches NPPS4 exactly.

user.userInfo.rationale: Listener observed user; scraper and NPPS4 both corroborate plus ad_status, birth.

achievement.rewardOpenAll.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (ground truth). Scraper cascade adds reward_item_list and is_last. NPPS4 covers both plus reward/achievement counters. The two callsites in m_boot/initialize.lua + unit_deck_cache_listener.lua read reward_item_list and unit_support_list — both confirmed present.

area.addReward.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4, no callsite. MUTATE endpoint per cascade pattern usually returns reward stack + user_info. Conservative minimal shape.

arena.dreamLiveGameOver.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Action category AMBIGUOUS. Sibling arena.dreamLiveEnd has live_info+arena_match_result and the m_arena/model/dream_live.lua caller reads exactly those, but a different caller dispatches on result data. Returning empty conservative shape — gameover often returns nothing distinct.

arena.matchLiveStart.rationale: Scraper output provides available_live_resume; 3 sibling *LiveStart endpoints (dream, privateMatch, rival) all share the same shape. Strong cross-sibling consensus.

arena.privateMatching.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Caller (m_arena/model/private_live.lua) shows opponent_info with matching_user → deck_info → unit_list reads later, but the immediate response unpack isn't shown. Sibling duel.privateStartWait returns matching_user+start_flag — inferred similar shape.

arena.rivalLiveStart.rationale: Scraper output provides available_live_resume; 3 sibling *LiveStart endpoints (dream, match, privateMatch) all share the same shape.

background.backgroundInfo.rationale: Listener observed background_info (ground truth). NPPS4 prior agrees and types it as list[BackgroundInfo]. Two sources align.

battle.gameover.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info and event_info (with nested event_id, event_point_info, event_reward_info). Header notes 5 root fields total but 3 crashed before being logged; we surface the 2 we have plus the typical *gameover/*LiveEnd reward-stack fields as optional.

challenge.challengeInfo.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 prior is unresolved root type (ChallengeInfoData | DummyModel). Sibling challenge.status returns challenge_info — most likely shape for an *Info READ endpoint.

challenge.proceed.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. MUTATE-style (advances challenge state). Sibling challenge.checkpoint returns can_proceed+challenge_info — likely similar shape after proceeding.

challenge.use.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/challenge/ — pipeline did not generate it. Emitting conservative MUTATE shape based on the *use* / item-use pattern (returns after_user_info and any consumed item info).

class.competitionTop.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/class/ — pipeline did not generate it. Conservative READ-style top/info shape based on sibling class.top pattern.

class.getMissionList.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/class/ — pipeline did not generate it. Conservative READ list pattern (*List endpoints typically return a list of objects).

class.rewardOpen.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/class/ — pipeline did not generate it. Conservative MUTATE reward-open shape based on the sibling achievement.rewardOpen pattern.

comeback.getReward.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/comeback/ — only achieveInfo.md exists. Conservative *getReward MUTATE shape (reward stack + user_info).

concert.buffSetting.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/concert/ — pipeline did not generate it. Conservative MUTATE/setting shape (often returns after_user_info or empty).

concert.result.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/concert/ — pipeline did not generate it. Conservative *result READ shape (returns result/score data).

duel.cancelMatching.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/duel/ — pipeline did not generate it. Conservative MUTATE/cancel shape (typically empty body or ack-only).

duel.leaveRoom.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/duel/ — pipeline did not generate it. Sibling duel.privateLeave/duel.leave typically return no body (ack-only).

duel.privateGameOver.rationale: Bundle file missing from build/synth_bundles/duel/ — pipeline did not generate it. Conservative *gameover MUTATE shape (reward stack + user_info), modeled on duel.liveEnd sibling pattern.

event.getRanking.rationale: No bundle file present in build/synth_bundles/event/. Name implies a ranking READ; inferring conservative ranking_list shape from ranking.* siblings (ranking.eventPlayer, ranking.eventLive).

eventscenario.finish.rationale: No bundle file present. Name 'finish' implies a terminal MUTATE acknowledging scenario completion. Most *finish endpoints in this game return either empty or a reward bundle; emitting minimal conservative shape.

exchange.exchangeItem.rationale: No bundle file present (existing exchange bundles are itemInfo/owningPoint/usePoint). Name 'exchangeItem' suggests MUTATE consuming exchange points; emitting before/after_user_info pattern from exchange.usePoint as conservative prior.

exchange.itemList.rationale: No bundle file present. Closest existing endpoint is exchange.itemInfo (which has exchange_item_info: list, exchange_point_list: list). Treating itemList as the same READ category; reusing its shape.

festival.livePlay.rationale: No bundle file present (festival has continue/gameover/liveReward/liveStart but no livePlay). Live play endpoints typically return live_info/live_list start payload; emitting minimal conservative shape.

free.liveEnd.rationale: No bundle file (no /free/ module directory). Endpoint may not exist or be under freeLive; treating as terminal live-end MUTATE returning reward/after_user_info per common live-end shape.

free.liveStart.rationale: No bundle file. Treating as live-start initiator returning resume token and live setup like arena.*LiveStart siblings.

freeLive.livePlay.rationale: Listed as livePlay but actual bundle is freeLive/play.md (freeLive.play). No listener, no scraper output, no NPPS4 prior. Caller m_boot/initialize.lua addListener('$freeLivePlay') passes (A0_3, A1_3) — second arg appears to be a derived list. Returning conservative shape.

friend.list.rationale: Scraper output (friend_list, new_friend_list, item_count) aligns exactly with NPPS4 prior (FriendListFriend list, new_friend_list, item_count). Two strong sources agree.

friend.searchNew.rationale: No bundle file (existing is friend/search.md). Treating as a variant of friend.search; reusing its NPPS4 shape (user_info, center_unit_info, friend_status, is_alliance, setting_award_id) as conservative prior.

greet.get.rationale: No bundle file (greet has delete/user). Inferring a READ that returns a list of greeting messages received; conservative shape.

handover.registerKid.rationale: Listed as registerKid; actual bundle is handover/kidRegister.md. No listener, scraper empty, NPPS4 returns None. Action is MUTATE consuming auth_code; caller in klabid/connect.lua does not destructure the response_data. Returning empty.

handover.sendMail.rationale: No bundle file. Name implies a MUTATE that triggers sending a transfer mail; typically returns acknowledgement with no payload. Returning empty.

klab_id.checkConsent.rationale: No bundle file. Name 'checkConsent' implies a READ checking GDPR/consent status. Returning minimal flag shape.

klab_id.syncFailedConsent.rationale: No bundle file. Name implies a MUTATE recording a failed consent sync; typically returns ack with no payload.

lbonus.adReward.rationale: Listener observed reward_list. Scraper cascade adds after_user_info.

live.liveStart.rationale: No bundle file (existing is live/play.md, live/continue.md, etc.). Endpoint may not exist; if it does, treating like other *LiveStart siblings (arena.matchLiveStart, arena.privateMatchLiveStart) which return available_live_resume.

live.play.rationale: Listener observed live_list, rank_info. Scraper + NPPS4 corroborate and add many supporting fields.

login.redeemSerialCode.rationale: Bundle not present in scrape; redeemSerialCode is a MUTATE that grants rewards from a code. Conservative shape: reward stack plus after_user_info.

marathon.eventTop.rationale: Bundle not present. Marathon top-style endpoints return a heterogeneous bag describing the event state. Conservative shape mirrors marathon.top/event-top siblings.

marathon.mileageInfo.rationale: Bundle not present. *Info READ endpoints typically mirror a master-row + user-progress pair. Conservative shape: current mileage value plus tier list with thresholds and rewards.

multiunit.multiunitAll.rationale: Bundle not present. *All READ endpoints return a full collection. multiunit module owns multi-unit/session rows.

notice.index.rationale: Bundle not present. notice.index is the landing/list endpoint for the in-game notice center. Conservative shape: paginated list of notice rows.

online.createOnlineRoom.rationale: Bundle not present. *Create MUTATE endpoint that opens a LAN room. Conservative shape: room descriptor plus matching id.

payment.processBilling.rationale: Bundle not present. Payment process endpoints return the billing result plus updated user wallet. Sibling payment.processLog uses similar shape.

profile.info.rationale: Bundle not present (profile.profileInfo exists but not profile.info). Conservative shape: a profile snapshot object for the requested user.

quest.checkpoint.rationale: Bundle not present. Checkpoint endpoints are typically mid-quest persistence; minimal payload acknowledging state save.

ranking.eventRanking.rationale: Bundle not present. Mirrors ranking.eventPlayer / ranking.eventLive shape: leaderboard rows plus the viewer's own row.

rlive.getRivalUnitDeck.rationale: Bundle not present. rlive module is rival-live mode; getRivalUnitDeck is a READ that returns the rival's deck for client display.

scenario.notReleasedSubScenario.rationale: Bundle not present. READ list of scenario rows the user hasn't unlocked yet.

secretbox.popInfo.rationale: Bundle not present. *Info READ endpoint that gates a popup; returns flags plus banner info for the secretbox UI.

sns.checkSns.rationale: Bundle not present. SNS check returns linked-account status; tiny status delta consistent with POLLING/READ.

stamp.list.rationale: Bundle not present (stamp.stampInfo / stamp.set exist). READ list pattern: stamp_list rows.

subscenario.play.rationale: Bundle not present (subscenario.startup / subscenario.reward exist). Play endpoint marks a sub-scenario chapter as watched; minimal MUTATE with user_info refresh.

unit.buildDeck.rationale: Bundle not present (unit.deck / unit.deckInfo / unit.deckName exist). buildDeck is a MUTATE that assembles a deck; returns the resulting deck object.

achievement.unaccomplishList.rationale: ROOTMODEL CONFLICT: NPPS4 says list[AchievementUnaccomplishedFilter] (RootModel). Listener reports 'achievement_list' as root field — but the model caller code explicitly does L1_2 = get('$achievementUnaccomplishList'); L0_3 = L1_2[1]; L0_3.is_last; L0_3.filter_category_id; L0_3.achievement_list — proving cached IS a top-level list and the listener walked into a per-element field. NPPS4 RootModel is structurally correct; per-element shape matches the caller's reads exactly.

area.list.rationale: No listener observations, no scraper output, no NPPS4 prior. Caller in m_location/campaign.lua reads area_list and secret_banner_flag from response_data. Both fields inferred from that callsite.

arena.dreamLiveStart.rationale: Scraper output yielded available_live_resume; sibling arena.matchLiveStart/privateMatchLiveStart/rivalLiveStart all share that shape. Action is a Start so we keep payload minimal.

arena.matching.rationale: Listener observed matching_user (ground truth, required). Sibling duel.startWait/duel.privateStartWait shapes confirm matching_user object is standard for *Matching/*StartWait. No NPPS4 prior.

arena.read.rationale: No listener observations, no scraper output, no NPPS4 prior. Endpoint name 'read' suggests acknowledging a notice/seen-state with no payload; siblings vary too much to draw on. Returning empty field list.

arena.sessionRanking.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Inferred from name plus paginated request fields (page, id, rank, buff). Conservative paginated list with a ranking_list of objects.

background.set.rationale: No listener, no scraper, NPPS4 handler returns None. MUTATE endpoint that likely returns no body beyond envelope.

battle.liveEnd.rationale: No listener observations, no scraper output, no NPPS4 prior. By pattern *LiveEnd usually returns reward-stack fields (before/after user_info, reward_item_list). Conservative minimal schema using the MUTATE/end pattern.

challenge.checkpoint.rationale: 7 listener-observed root fields (ground truth) — mid-live checkpoint mutate that updates user state extensively. Scraper-only fields can_proceed/challenge_info corroborate the action shape.

challenge.retire.rationale: Listener observed 3 root fields: after_user_info, event_info (with nested event_reward_info), reward_item_list. Matches AMBIGUOUS-but-MUTATE retire pattern returning reward stack.

class.competitionGameover.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Sibling class.competitionResult/class.competitionHallOfFame return {result: bool}. Plausible minimal shape; also include class_system per class-module gameover pattern.

class.competitionReady.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Ready/setup endpoint; siblings return {result: bool}. Conservative tiny payload.

class.gameover.rationale: Listener observed 2 root field(s): note_log, reward_item_list. Scraper cascade adds 4 field(s). 2 field(s) agree across sources.

class.top.rationale: Listener observed 2 root field(s): challenge_mission_list, challenge_rewards. Scraper cascade adds 8 field(s). 2 field(s) agree across sources.

common.logger.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Pure logging endpoint; almost certainly empty body beyond envelope.

concert.livePartyList.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): party_list. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

costume.costumeList.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): costume_list. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

download.event.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): url_list. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duel.endRoom.rationale: 5 listener-observed root fields (ground truth). Scraper provides full live-end reward stack identical to battle.endRoom sibling.

duel.liveLog.rationale: Listener observed 1 root field(s): live_log_list. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s). 1 field(s) agree across sources.

duel.privateJoin.rationale: Listener fired (1 root). Scraper cascade returned error_code, difficulty, room_id. Sibling duty.privateJoin matches exactly. The leaked schema path live_list.[0] suggests an optional live_list nested array but not certain.

duel.top.rationale: No listener observations but scraper cascade returns is_open. Sibling duty.top/battle.top patterns include event_status.

duty.history.rationale: Scraper cascade returns room_list (list of objects). READ paginated pattern; request includes page so adding optional is_last/count is plausible but kept conservative.

duty.privateCreate.rationale: Scraper cascade returns room_id and entry_token. Sibling duel.privateCreate has identical shape.

duty.startWait.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Polling/wait endpoint; siblings include start_flag and matching_user.

eventscenario.reward.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list (3 crashes mid-body). Scraper cascade adds after_user_info, class_system.

festival.continue.rationale: Listener observed rank_info. Scraper cascade adds live_info.

festival.liveStart.rationale: Listener observed live_list. Scraper cascade adds available_live_resume.

gdpr.get.rationale: No listener observations. Scraper + NPPS4 agree on enable_gdpr, is_eea. Scraper adds resume, views.

handover.exec.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 handler returns None. handover.exec performs the actual account transfer; likely returns a session/user_info bundle but cannot pin down without observation. Conservative empty schema.

handover.kidStatus.rationale: Scraper cascade returns has_klab_id and NPPS4 prior has has_klab_id (bool). Single-field READ. Scraper's int vs NPPS4 bool — using int since scraper observed actual game wire shape.

item.useLotteryTicket.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list. Scraper cascade adds after_user_info.

klab_id.kidRewardOpen.rationale: Listener observed reward_item_list with subfield accessory_owning_user_id (3 crashes). Scraper adds after_user_info.

livese.liveseInfo.rationale: Listener + scraper + NPPS4 all agree on live_se_list as list of int.

marathon.marathonInfo.rationale: Listener observed marathon_info_list. Scraper agrees. NPPS4 root is list[MarathonInfoData] (singleton wrapped in cascade as marathon_info_list).

navigation.specialCutin.rationale: Listener observed special_cutin_list. Scraper + NPPS4 both confirm list shape.

online.exhibitionResult.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Online/LAN exhibition result. Conservative single boolean.

payment.month.rationale: Listener observed item_count + payment_month_list. Scraper confirms payment_month_list.

personalnotice.agree.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Simple agree/ack endpoint; likely returns empty body or a minimal status flag.

platformAccount.isConnectedLlAccount.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. Action name implies a single bool return.

profile.profileRegister.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 handler returns None. MUTATE endpoint that probably returns no body beyond envelope (or just after_user_info).

quest.questInfo.rationale: Listener observed quest_list. Scraper confirms list shape.

ranking.eventFriendPlayer.rationale: Listener observed ranking_list. Scraper adds is_last (paginated leaderboard).

reward.adReward.rationale: Scraper cascade returns reward_list. No listener or NPPS4 but scraper is verified callsite read.

reward.rewardList.rationale: Listener observed items. Scraper + NPPS4 align fully on ad_info, item_count, items, limit, order.

rlive.play.rationale: Listener observed live_list + rank_info. Scraper additionally provides live_info (per-live detail).

secretbox.knapsackReset.rationale: No listener, no scraper, no NPPS4. MUTATE/reset that probably returns updated secretbox state. Conservative minimal.

secretbox.showDetail.rationale: Listener observed unit_line_up; scraper and NPPS4 both corroborate plus rule_url, url.

stamp.stampInfo.rationale: Listener observed both root fields; scraper and NPPS4 both corroborate. Strong 3-source agreement.

tutorial.progress.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 returns None. MUTATE state save; likely empty body beyond envelope.

unit.changeDelegate.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (with game_coin sub-read). MUTATE/change pattern; single field confirmed by listener.

unit.favorite.rationale: No listener, no scraper, NPPS4 returns None. Toggle/MUTATE that likely returns nothing beyond envelope.

unit.removableSkillEquipment.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 returns None. MUTATE/equip toggle; sibling unit.removableSkillSell has after_user_info.

unit.setDisplayRank.rationale: No listener, no scraper. NPPS4 returns None. Sibling unit.rankUp returns after.display_rank; MUTATE state save likely returns updated card state.

user.addFriendMax.rationale: Scraper cascade returns after_friend_max and used_loveca. Sibling user.addUnitMax has identical pattern (after_unit_max + used_loveca). Two sources align.

user.setBirth.rationale: Scraper cascade returns is_today_birthday. Single source but direct scraper observation.

arena.dreamLiveContinue.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/arena/. Inferring from sibling matchLiveContinue/rivalLiveContinue shapes (after_sns_coin, live_info, after_user_info typical for arena *Continue endpoints).

award.awardAll.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/award/ (only awardInfo.md, set.md exist). Inferring as award READ list from common award patterns.

challenge.itemUse.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/challenge/. Inferring as item-use MUTATE that likely updates user state and challenge_info.

challenge.liveEnd.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/challenge/. Inferring as standard live-end shape analogous to battle.endRoom / arena.matchLiveEnd.

challenge.start.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/challenge/ (init.md is the likely real name). Inferring start MUTATE shape.

class.missionRewardOpen.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/class/. Inferring as reward open MUTATE following class.rewardOpen / achievement.rewardOpen patterns.

duel.privateEndWait.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/duel/. Inferring from sibling duel.endWait (matching_user + end_flag) and duel.privateStartWait shape.

duel.result.rationale: Bundle file MISSING — not present in build/synth_bundles/duel/. Inferring as duel result READ shape combining sibling duel.endRoom rewards + simple result fields.

duel.startWait.rationale: Listener confirmed matching_user (ground truth). Scraper-only result. Simple polling-wait READ for duel start.

duel.privateCreate.rationale: No listener observations. Scraper cascade adds 2 field(s).

duty.gameover.rationale: Listener observed 2 root field(s): after_user_info, event_info. Scraper cascade adds 1 field(s).

exchange.usePoint.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (3 crashes mid-body). Scraper empty. NPPS4 prior adds before_user_info, exchange_reward.

payment.history.rationale: Listener observed item_count + payment_history_list. Scraper confirms payment_history_list.

secretbox.all.rationale: Listener observed item_list; NPPS4 prior corroborates plus gauge_info, is_unit_max, member_category_list, use_cache. Scraper empty but NPPS4 is the verified reference.

unit.exchangePointRankUp.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info + after_exchange_point; NPPS4 corroborates and supplies full MUTATE pattern (before/after, achievement lists).

unit.rankUp.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (game_coin nested); scraper has 'after' object with display_rank; NPPS4 provides full MUTATE pattern.

unit.saleAccessory.rationale: Listener observed after_user_info (game_coin nested) only; scraper empty and no NPPS4. Conservative single-field shape matching unit.sale pattern.

download.batch.rationale: ROOTMODEL CONFLICT: NPPS4 says list[DownloadInfo] (RootModel). No listener fired and no scraper output. However, sibling download.additional and download.event both have listener-observed 'url_list' wrapper — and download.batch shares NPPS4's DownloadCommonResponse type with download.additional. Strongly suggests same wrapper shape applies. Following sibling evidence over NPPS4 RootModel.
